VAL-I6-HYDRA.evidence: Logged in as utval-frontend1@galileo.test, navigated to /dashboard, reloaded page. `agent-browser errors` returned empty (no JS errors). `agent-browser console` returned empty. No hydration error #418, no 'Hydration failed', no 'Text content does not match' messages. Screenshots: dashboard-after-login.png, dashboard-fresh-load.png.
VAL-I6-HYDRA.details: AuthGuard renders consistently on SSR and client — no null→div mismatch. Dashboard pages load cleanly without React hydration errors.

VAL-I10-CTX.evidence: After fresh page reload of /dashboard, `agent-browser network requests` shows exactly 1 GET http://localhost:4000/auth/me (fetch) request. Multiple components on the dashboard share a single /auth/me fetch via AuthProvider Context, not one per hook instance.
VAL-I10-CTX.details: Network request log from fresh dashboard load confirmed only 1 /auth/me fetch. Full request list captured showing all document, script, stylesheet, font, and fetch requests — only a single /auth/me call among them.
